gaps.issue: No tests exist for src/lib/session-state.ts (file not yet created). This module will own PID-file I/O, kill-0 liveness checks, and stale-session cleanup — all four spec scenarios depend on it being correct.
gaps.recommendation: Write unit tests for session-state.ts before or alongside implementation: (1) no PID file → returns null, (2) live PID → returns session metadata, (3) dead PID → cleans up files, (4) live PID but missing session JSON → graceful fallback.

gaps.issue: No tests exist for src/commands/status.tsx (file not yet created). The command's output format and branching logic are unverified.
gaps.recommendation: Add Ink render tests (like existing command tests) covering active-session and no-session output paths.

gaps.issue: src/index.tsx command routing has no test coverage for the new `status` command dispatch path.
gaps.recommendation: Extend existing routing tests (likely src/__tests__/app-f035.test.ts or similar) to assert `harness status` routes to statusCommand().

gaps.issue: PID liveness check (kill -0) is OS-specific and involves real process-table side effects. No test isolation pattern exists yet for process-ID checks.
gaps.recommendation: Inject a `isAlive(pid)` function into session-state.ts so tests can mock it without spawning real processes.

gaps.issue: No lint toolchain (no ESLint config, no lint script). New files will be written without style enforcement.
gaps.recommendation: Low priority for this feature, but consider adding eslint post-implementation to prevent style drift.

gaps.issue: No code coverage reporting configured. It's unclear what percentage of lines are exercised.
gaps.recommendation: Add vitest.config.ts with coverage: { provider: 'v8' } to enable coverage reporting.
